steps.title: Focus on David's effect
steps.content: David notices Frederick's interest in the ship and offers to adapt to his plans. That affectionate willingness wins the old man's heart and makes them almost like old friends. The final comparison shows that the relationship shift, not the ship itself, is central.

steps.title: Reject practical or invented aims
steps.content: A narrows the text to sleeping arrangements, C invents excitement about a trip, and D invents wary first impressions. Sleeping on board is only the occasion for the relationship strengthened by David's flexibility, not the main point. The answer is B.
